prediction.reasoning: Using a geometric Brownian motion model with historical volatility assumptions for large-cap stocks (~20% annual volatility), the point estimate remains at current price due to random walk theory. Confidence intervals widen with time horizon (22 days) and confidence level, accounting for typical stock price uncertainty. The intervals assume normal distribution of log returns and reflect increasing uncertainty over the 22-day period.
